resources.string: A full-size speech button with built-in letter, number, and symbol keyboards. Password fields open typing automatically, and custom phrases can bias recognition.
Tap anywhere to dictate. Long-press for the built-in typing keyboard. Tap SPEAK to return.
One word or phrase per line, such as names, app terms, or custom vocabulary
Imported %1$d dictionary words and %2$d contact names.
Contacts permission denied. Dictionary/contact import was not run.
SpeechBoard is enabled but not active. Select SpeechBoard in the keyboard picker now.
SpeechBoard is not enabled. Tap “Enable SpeechBoard” first.
Launch test: waiting up to 5 seconds for SpeechBoard…
PASS: SpeechBoard’s input view launched after the test began.
SpeechBoard is installed but not enabled as an input method.
SpeechBoard is enabled but not selected. Current keyboard: %1$s
SpeechBoard is selected, but onStartInputView() never ran within 5 seconds.
